title: 6: Protocol optimization for SABER-FISH in tissues
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dm1i1","text":"This protocol summarizes several tested variations to simplify the SABER-FISH protocol in tissues; In most cases robust signal was found.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f2fij","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"454tu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b5vs6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e1sh1","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"fbun7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"notes","mutability":"","data":{"blocks":[{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"length":21,"offset":29}],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"cj70b","text":"This protocol is part of the SABER-FISH collection.","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{"0":{"data":{"guid":"6C520E2EC12D11EA9C800A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://www.protocols.io/private/91CC071CBF7711EAB11E0A58A9FEAC2A"},"mutability":"","type":"link"}}}}}}

steps: Figure S3 : Testing variations in the RNA FISH staining protocol. a , Overview of main steps in the RNA FISH protocol. The most efficient condition tested in this experiment is shown below each step. b , Table of eight conditions tested in side-byside comparison. See Methods for additional details. c , Quantification of signal intensity for conditions tested, with each line representing a replicate (N=2 retinal sections per condition). Each condition was tested using two-color FISH for Vsx1 and Grik1 . d , Representative images of conditions tested. Scale bar is 10 µm. All sections 40 µM, from P25 animals.
creator: Jocelynkishi
